question: Which of the following is true for First Person View (FPV) operation?

options.text: Vision aids, such as binoculars, may be used throughout the flight to enhance situational awareness.
You only need 1 crew apart from the UA pilot to maintain visual line of sight with the UA at all times.
You may fly FPV without any crew member capable of keeping the UA within visual line of sight at any time.

classification_notes: FPV operation still requires a crew member to maintain VLOS.
